title: Principal Engineer - Applications - AI/ML
description:
Are you looking for a unique opportunity to be a part of
something great? Want to join a 17,000-member team that
works on the technology that powers the world around us?
Looking for an atmosphere of trust, empowerment, respect,
diversity, and communication? How about an opportunity to
own a piece of a multi-billion dollar (with a B!) global
organization? We offer all that and more at Microchip
Technology Inc.

People come to work at Microchip because we help design the
technology that runs the world. They stay because our
culture supports their growth and stability. They are
challenged and driven by an incredible array of products and
solutions with unlimited career potential. Microchip’s
nationally-recognized Leadership Passage Programs support
career growth where we proudly enroll over a thousand people
annually. We take pride in our commitment to employee
development, values-based decision making, and strong sense
of community, driven by our Vision, Mission, and 11 Guiding
Values; we affectionately refer to it as the Aggregate
System and it’s won us countless awards for diversity and
workplace excellence.

Our company is built by dedicated team players who love to
challenge the status quo; we did not achieve record revenue
and over 30 years of quarterly profitability without a great
team dedicated to empowering innovation. People like you.

Visit our careers page to see what exciting opportunities
and company perks await!

Job Description:

Microchip Technology Inc. is seeking Senior Applications
Engineer to support the development of Edge AI / Machine
Learning demonstrations on Microchip MCU, MPU, and FPGA
platforms. This role focuses on creating, validating, and
documenting reference designs and demonstrations that enable
customers to deploy AI/ML workloads on resource-constrained
embedded systems. The successful candidate will work closely
with internal engineering, marketing, and field teams to
enable customers through high-quality demos, example code,
and technical collateral.


Join our growing Edge AI team!

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop Embedded applications using Microchip AI offerings
  demonstrating product capabilities and features set with
  focus on Edge AI based solutions
- Develop reference solutions and proof of concept demos to
  assist customers in designing, developing &
  troubleshooting Edge AI applications like Audio / voice
  implementation using AI on MCU platforms using TinyML.
- Attend meetings with various stakeholders to understand the
  key customer issues and come up with solutions to solve
  them
- Participate in Development, review and implementation of
  AI/ML applications, models and algorithms optimized for
  edge computing environments in our cloud-based development
  and application space.
- Use AI models in various platforms using TFLite, Tensorflow,
  ONNX, Pytorch based technologies.
- Provide presentations and trainings on technical topics to
  customers and other stakeholders
- Provide feedback on improvements in Microchip’s hardware,
  software, tools and documentation targeting Edge AI
  solutions.
- Work closely with product management to help define project
  requirements, milestones, and deliverables.
- Work with software engineers to develop methodologies in
  gathering, applying and evaluating data for consumption by
  AI models running on Edge AI hardware.
- Train and tune AI models for efficient execution on hardware
  platforms.
- Utilize best practices in software development, including
  code reviews, unit testing, integration and continuous
  integration.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI/ML and
  edge computing technologies to ensure our solutions remain
  at the cutting edge.
- Work in a team environment, developing and fostering a
  culture of innovation and continuous improvement.

Requirements/Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s, Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electronics
  Engineering or related field.
- 10+ years of total experience in Embedded design and
  development and at least 2+ years of specific AI/ML based
  application development.
- Proficient knowledge in using machine learning development
  languages, tools and frameworks, such as the MPLAB Machine
  Learning Development Suite and Python AI/ML libraries
  using TensorFlow/TFLite, Pytorch, Keras, and ONNX.
- Prior experience on any part of audio processing / DSP would
  be an advantage.
- Prior experience implementing tiny ML class algorithm on ARM
  M0 to M7 class MCU and / or similar performance DSP would
  be preferred.
- Solid programming experience in Embedded C and use of
  Embedded Software frameworks/ solutions and OS
  fundamentals.
- Good knowledge of one of more communication
  protocols/interfaces such as I2C, SPI, UART as well as
  other peripherals such as ADC/DAC, PWM, RTC, WDT,
  Timer/Counters
- Experience in USB/ Ethernet MAC/ Graphics will be an added
  advantage
- Application layer software development experience on
  embedded systems. Ability to translate complex technical
  concepts into simplified examples.
- Work experience on IDE tools like MPLAB IDE/ IAR Workbench/
  Keil MDK/ Atmel Studio or Linux environments
- Exposure with RTOS/ Zephyr would be an added advantage
- Team player with Strong written and verbal communication
  skills.
- Must be highly motivated. Possess eager attitude toward
  learning new skills & technology

Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience in TinyML or Edge AI workflows.Familiarity with
  use of computing platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI) and
  edge-to-cloud integration.
- Knowledge of data collection, preprocessing, and training
  neural networks in data centers.
- Solid understanding of edge computing architectures,
  including IoT devices, embedded systems, and real-time
  processing.
- Experience with edge computing platforms and optimizing
  AI/ML models for resource-constrained devices.
- Knowledge of signal processing and analysis in an ML
  framework.
- Knowledge of security and privacy considerations in edge
  computing and cyber security development and analysis
  methods using ISO-21434 workflow requirements.

Travel Time:

0% - 25%

To all recruitment agencies: Microchip Technology Inc. does
not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward
resumes to our recruiting team or other Microchip employees.
Microchip is not responsible for any fees related to
unsolicited resumes.
responsibilities: Develop embedded applications using Microchip AI offerings demonstrating product capabilities with focus on Edge AI solutions
Develop reference solutions and proof of concept demos to assist customers in designing Edge AI applications including audio/voice implementation using TinyML
Train and tune AI models for efficient execution on hardware platforms using TFLite, TensorFlow, ONNX, and PyTorch
Provide presentations and trainings on technical topics to customers and other stakeholders
Provide feedback on improvements in Microchip's hardware, software, tools and documentation targeting Edge AI solutions
Work with software engineers to develop methodologies in gathering, applying and evaluating data for consumption by AI models
use_cases: Audio/voice recognition and implementation on MCU platforms
TinyML algorithm deployment on resource-constrained embedded devices
Edge AI inference on ARM M0 to M7 class MCUs and DSP platforms
Signal processing and analysis within ML frameworks
Real-time AI processing for IoT and embedded applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work training, tuning, and
optimizing AI models for edge computing environments. The
engineer develops AI/ML applications using frameworks like
TensorFlow, PyTorch, and ONNX, directly implementing TinyML
algorithms on resource-constrained embedded platforms.
